data.title: Cabot declares $0.43 dividend
data.description:
• Cabot (NYSE:CBT) declares $0.43/share quarterly dividend, in line with previous.
  • Forward yield 1.98%

  • See CBT Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Baymount announces termination of private placement
data.description:
• Baymount (BYM.H:CA) on Friday said the company has terminated its previously announced private placement of units for aggregate gross proceeds of up to $100,000 through the issuance of units at $0.01 per unit.
  • BYM.H:CA closed -50.0% at $0.005.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: EnGold Mines appoints interim CFO
data.description:
• EnGold Mines (TSXV:EGM:CA) reported that director Dale Reimer has been appointed chief financial officer on an interim basis.
  • Director John K. Brown has been appointed chairman of the company on an interim basis.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: BioXcel Therapeutics files to sell 5.1M shares of common stock by selling shareholders
data.description:
• BioXcel Therapeutics (NASDAQ:BTAI) filed a prospectus related to the offer and resale of up to about 5.1M shares of common stock.
  • This prospectus is not an offer to sell.
  • The company will not receive any proceeds from the sale of ordinary shares by the selling shareholder.
  • Filing

data.title: Zhibao Technology announces securities offering
data.description:
• Zhibao Technology (NASDAQ:ZBAO) announced sale of 31.65M shares of class A shares and 892,588 class A shares, issuable upon exercise of warrants by selling shareholders.
  • The selling shareholders are GEM Global Yield and GEM Yield Bahamas Limited.
  • ZBAO will not receive any proceeds from the offering.
  • Source: SEC filing

data.title: Boqii announces ADS ratio change
data.description:
• Boqii Holding (NYSE:BQ) announced that it will change its ratio of its American Depositary Shares to Class A ordinary shares from one ADS representing fifteen Class A ordinary shares to one ADS representing one hundred and fifty Class A ordinary shares.
  • The ADS Ratio Change is expected to become effective on or about January 21, 2025 (U.S. Eastern Time).
  • For Boqii's ADS holders, the ADS Ratio Change will have the same effect as a 1-for-10 reverse split on the existing ADSs.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Constellation Energy powers to all-time highs after blockbuster Calpine deal
data.description:
Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG), already the biggest U.S. nuclear plant operator, also will become the largest independent power provider in the U.S. after agreeing to buy privately-held natural gas and geothermal company Calpine, sending its shares closing +25.1% to an all-time high of $310.
Constellation (NASDAQ:CEG) said the acquisition could add $2B/year to its free cash flow, and together the companies would have nearly 60 GW of capacity from zero- and low-emission sources, including nuclear, natural gas and geothermal.
Although Constellation (CEG) will issue 50M new shares as part of the deal, the market is cheering because the acquisition is expected to provide immediate earnings per share accretion of more than 20% in 2026 and at least $2/share in future years.
The attractive purchase price is a key factor behind the expected earnings accretion, analysts say: With a net purchase price of $26.6B - which includes Calpine's net debt, the expected cash generated by Calpine between the deal signing and the expected closing date, and the value of tax attributes at Calpine - Constellation (CEG) is paying less than 8x Calpine's expected 2026 EBITDA, analysts said.
From a strategic view, the addition of Calpine provides Constellation (CEG) with significantly more exposure to the Texas and California markets, which figure to be very active in the expansion of data centers, while also complementing its current core markets in the Midwest and East coast.
While the deal adds fossil fuel exposure, it also comes with a sizeable clean energy portfolio, and the combined company will still have a generation footprint that is 58% zero carbon, according to a report from S&P Global.
Even before Friday’s run-up, Constellation's (CEG) enterprise value as a multiple of 2026 EBITDA looked frothy, but since there are only four public power generators with exposure to the AI-demand theme - joining Vistra (VST), Talen Energy (TLN) and NRG Energy (NRG) - the deal was the right one to send an already high-powered stock like Constellation surging.
ETF: (XLU)

data.title: System1 receives NYSE non-compliance notice
data.description:
• System1 (NYSE:SST) said on Friday that it was notified by the New York Stock Exchange that it is not in compliance with NYSE’s listing standards because the average closing price of the company’s Class A common stock was less than $1.00 over a consecutive 30 trading-day period.
  • The notice does not result in the immediate delisting of the company’s common stock from the NYSE.
  • The company plans to notify the NYSE by January 21, 2025 that it intends to cure the average closing stock price deficiency and to return to compliance with the NYSE's continued listing standards.
  • System1 (NYSE:SST) shares were up 1.43% in post-market trading on Friday.
